commits: refactor: apply review suggestions for guardrail English unification
fix(guardrail): re-throw unexpected errors from loadConfig in resolveGuardrailContext
feat: unify guardrail files to English and remove multilingual support

retro.notes: All 6 requirements are fully satisfied. Two unplanned changes exist in src/lib/: an error code discriminator added to loadJsonFile and a targeted catch in resolveGuardrailContext — both are defensive quality improvements approved during review (review item #4) and gate (issue-log entry). Preset count discrepancy (28 actual vs 17 in spec) is a spec undercount, not an over-delivery issue; the requirement intent ('all presets') is met.
